it went well, nice.

that's awesome.

back to normal
life.

it, it will be fun.

that's, that's the way that we're headed.

yeah, and this, I mean, this really has not much to do with, with me and what I'm managing, but just, just curious on their feedback because it's super helpful

Why, why are we gonna take it out of their hands?
You know.

Let's teach our teams how to do it rather than having somebody else do it when our teams don't know how to do it.

um, my only update on you as far as what's new and then we can jump into what's been performing.

We can also do it separately.

So it's, it would be like uh one unit level post.
So like something that's talking about granite countertops or floor to ceiling windows with some pictures.
Um One post a week would be around the actual amenities at the property.
So maybe like a pool post or a workout room.
Um And then the third would actually be posting about any availability that you have at the unit.
Um If you have a bunch of like one bedrooms available for example, we'll make sure to post something about your available one beds with like a floor plan image.
So
yeah.

and see how many are emails and calls for you

Any questions on the performance tracking with leads?
